flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hudson Valley Community College rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.4k → $3.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hudson Valley Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.8k → $11.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hudson Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Hudson Valley Community College are 10% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($45.5k vs $41.2k).
